name: Influencer Butler
description: MCP server for Influencer Butler — features catalog, pricing, affiliate link creation, and earnings summary for influencer creators.

tools.name: list_features
tools.description: List all Influencer Butler product features with slugs, titles and descriptions.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Return the public pricing tiers (free, monthly, annual).

tools.name: create_affiliate_link
tools.description: Create a branded affiliate referral code for the authenticated influencer.

tools.name: get_earnings_summary
tools.description: Return the authenticated user's recent affiliate earnings summary.
